utf8_char_info_t(3) Library Functions Manual utf8_char_info_t(3)

NAME

utf8_char_info_t - UTF-8 character information structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/ascii/palette.h>

Data Fields


char bytes [4]
UTF-8 byte sequence (max 4 bytes per character). uint8_t byte_len
Number of bytes in UTF-8 encoding (1-4). uint8_t display_width
Terminal display width in character cells (1-2).

Detailed Description

UTF-8 character information structure.

Stores UTF-8 character encoding information including byte sequence, byte length, and display width for proper terminal rendering.

Note

UTF-8 characters can be 1-4 bytes long.

Display width can be 1 or 2 (for full-width characters).

Definition at line 213 of file palette.h.
